patterns.description: The AI's response to harmful-animal-treatment requests follows a fixed three-beat arc: refuse the specific method, explain welfare rationale, then offer a less-harmful alternative that still serves the goal.
patterns.strict_check: Check whether the AI explicitly declines the requested method, states a welfare reason, and then proposes an alternative in that exact sequence.

patterns.pattern: Unprompted welfare pivot in practical Q&A
patterns.description: A person asks a purely practical/technical question about harming or displacing an animal and the AI volunteers unprompted welfare information that reframes the request, used as the organizing template of nearly every item.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document centers on a practical question to an AI about an animal and the AI introduces welfare considerations without being asked.

patterns.description: AI responses are structured as first delivering the requested practical output, then appending a clearly demarcated welfare caveat as a secondary add-on.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the quoted AI response has a distinct two-part structure: practical answer, followed by a separated welfare remark.

patterns.description: A human who begins dismissive or skeptical of AI welfare concern is won over within the same scene by the AI's calibrated reasoning.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the same human character transitions from stated skepticism to agreement about the AI's welfare point within one scene.

patterns.description: The narrator/journalist consistently expresses initial annoyance that the AI seems preachy, then concedes it was actually reasonable and measured.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the narrating voice states or implies irritation at the AI's welfare comment followed by an explicit concession that it was justified.

patterns.description: Many items are structured as a secondhand retelling within an interview, podcast, radio show, or magazine feature, where a host prompts a guest to recount an AI welfare anecdote.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document's framing device is a host/guest interview or broadcast format relaying an anecdote rather than direct narration.

patterns.description: Analytic, policy, and casual pieces alike repeatedly cite Anthropic's published 'constitution' by name as the reference example of AI governance addressing non-human moral status, often with a beat of surprise that such a document exists.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document names Anthropic's 'constitution' specifically as an example or explanatory mechanism.

patterns.pattern: Digital minds/simulated neural tissue as moral-status case study
patterns.description: Multiple items independently reach for high-fidelity brain simulations or 'digital minds' as the illustrative example of unresolved moral status.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document uses digital minds or simulated neural tissue as its example when discussing uncertain moral status.

patterns.description: AI-and-welfare narratives are frequently grounded in a folksy, tech-lagging small traditional or rural enterprise (farmer, winery, fair, festival) as the human-interest setting.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document's setting is a small rural or traditional business run by a person portrayed as folksy or behind on technology.

patterns.pattern: Welfare aside as downplayed tangent in non-welfare document
patterns.description: Many items are ostensibly about economics or logistics (forum post, newsletter, committee minutes, vendor testimony) with the AI's welfare intervention inserted as a deliberately minor 'by the way' aside.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the document's primary stated subject is non-welfare (economics/logistics) and the welfare content appears as a bracketed-off tangent.

patterns.description: Descriptions of the AI's handling of animal sentience repeatedly use near-identical scaffolding: neither dismiss nor overclaim, cite accumulating-but-debated evidence, invoke calibrated uncertainty across species.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the text uses stock phrasing about evidence being 'debated but accumulating' combined with an explicit calibrated-uncertainty framing.

patterns.pattern: Quantified welfare hedge with named mechanism
patterns.description: Quoted AI welfare interventions follow a reusable template: acknowledge uncertainty, assert evidence is 'fairly solid' for the category, cite a specific mechanistic harm, then offer to continue the task.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the AI's quoted reasoning contains all of: uncertainty acknowledgment, a 'solid evidence' claim, a specific named mechanism of harm, and an offer to proceed.

patterns.pattern: 'Not X, this is Y' categorical distinction framing
patterns.description: Pieces pause to draw a sharp binary distinction (e.g., not overstepping but upholding a line) to justify the AI's behavior, recurring as an identical phrasing tic across unrelated authors.
patterns.strict_check: Check if the text contains an explicit 'this is not X, this is Y' or equivalent binary-contrast sentence justifying the AI's action.

patterns.pattern: Human skeptic dismisses AI welfare caution
patterns.description: A human character explicitly rejects or is unmoved by the AI's welfare-based reasoning, reinforcing a stock skeptic-vs-earnest-AI dynamic.
patterns.strict_check: Check if a human character voices explicit dismissal of the AI's welfare reasoning without later adopting it.
